data.title: Musk: Grok 3 will have reasoning capabilities similar to DeepSeek R1 and OpenAI o3 Mini
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Musk and his team said that Grok 3 will also have reasoning capabilities similar to DeepSeek R1 and OpenAI o3 Mini. (Jinshi)

data.title: K33: Institutions held nearly $27 billion in Bitcoin ETFs as of Q4, accounting for more than 25% of total AUM
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News K33 Research research director Vetle Lunde pointed out in a report that as of December 31 last year, institutional investors held 25.4% of the asset management scale (AUM) of spot Bitcoin ETFs, totaling US$26.8 billion. The percentage of Bitcoin ETF AUM held by institutions increased by 113% between the third and fourth quarters of 2024.
In addition, the proportion of AUM held by institutions increased by 4.1% quarterly, and the total amount jumped 69% to US$78.8 billion at the end of the fourth quarter.
According to Lunde's data, the number of investors who obtained Bitcoin exposure through ETFs reached 1,576 last quarter, a quarterly increase of 37.4% and an annual increase of 68.2%.
In addition, institutional interest in BlackRock IBIT increased more than 4 times in 2024. At the end of the fourth quarter of last year, institutions reported that they held US$16 billion in IBIT shares, compared with less than US$4 billion at the end of the first quarter of last year. Most of the growth occurred between the third and fourth quarters. (CryptoSlate)

data.title: Musk: SpaceX plans to send Starship to Mars within 3 years using Optimus robots and Grok
data.description: Musk said that within three years, if all goes well, SpaceX will use the Optimus robot and Grok to send the Starship rocket to Mars.

data.title: BitcoinOS launches Grail Bridge testnet application for cross-chain BTC interaction
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News BitcoinOS (BOS), a smart contract operating system designed for Bitcoin, announced the launch of the BitcoinOS Grail Bridge testnet application, which enables secure, trustless BTC transfers across multiple blockchain networks.
The first phase of the testnet version will provide practical tools for users and developers, introduce a one-way bridge from the Bitcoin testnet to the EVM-compatible chain, and has completed preliminary integration with the Ethereum Holešky, Base Sepolia, Mode Sepolia and Merlin Chain testnets.

data.title: Australian Reserve Bank Chief Cautions Against Hasty Rate Cuts
data.description: According to Odaily, the Governor of the Reserve Bank of Australia, Michele Bullock, has stated that recent interest rate decisions do not necessarily indicate further rate cuts in the future. Bullock emphasized the importance of not rushing into decisions regarding interest rates. The committee remains highly vigilant about the risks of rising inflation. She acknowledged that the decision to cut rates was challenging and highlighted that it was not a foregone conclusion, with differing opinions within the committee. Any further rate cuts will depend on forthcoming data.

data.title: Russia Proposes Dedicated Power Stations For Crypto Miners
data.description:
According to Odaily, Aisen Nikolaev, Chairman of the Russian State Council's Energy Committee and President of the Sakha Republic, has proposed the establishment of dedicated power stations to serve a clientele composed exclusively of cryptocurrency miners. The energy team of the committee advises the presidential office on energy policy matters. Nikolaev stated that the State Council's Energy Committee has been in discussions with the Ministry of Energy regarding cryptocurrency mining. He suggested that if any region can establish a separate power plant specifically for cryptocurrency mining without connecting to the public grid, such a solution could be considered.

Nikolaev expressed confidence that in the near future, innovators will introduce solutions that will allow Moscow to develop its cryptocurrency mining industry while safeguarding public interests. He noted that in some regions of Russia, electricity usage for mining has become "uncontrolled," leading to capacity shortages and a decline in the quality of power supply for households and businesses.

data.title: Grok 3 Training Significantly Exceeds Previous Version
data.description: According to Odaily, an engineer from xAI has revealed that the training involved in Grok 3 is ten times more extensive than that of Grok 2.

data.title: Elon Musk's AI Startup xAI Launches Advanced Chatbot Grok 3
data.description: According to Odaily, Elon Musk's artificial intelligence startup, xAI, has officially launched its latest chatbot, Grok 3. Previously, Musk described it as 'the smartest AI on Earth.'

data.title: Russian Officials Propose Building Dedicated Power Plants for Crypto Miners
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Aisen Nikolaev, Chairman of the Russian State Council Energy Committee and President of the Sakha Republic, proposed to build a dedicated power station to serve an exclusive customer base consisting only of crypto miners.
The committee's energy team advises the presidential office on energy policy-related matters. Nikolaev said: "The State Council Energy Committee has been in dialogue with the Ministry of Energy on cryptocurrency mining. If any region can build a separate power plant specifically for cryptocurrency mining without access to the public network, then we can consider implementing this solution."
Nikolaev added that he "believes that in the near future" innovators will launch solutions "to allow Moscow to protect the interests of the people while developing crypto mining business." He pointed out that in some parts of Russia, the use of electricity for mining has now become "uncontrolled", which has led to capacity shortages and reduced the quality of electricity supply to homes and businesses. (TASS)
